hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd 'C:\Users\Orismar\Documents\StockDan\stockdan-app'; $changes = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($changes) { git add -A; $msg = 'chore: auto-deploy via Claude [' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') + ']'; git commit -m $msg; git push origin master; vercel --prod --yes 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 } else { Write-Output 'Sem alterações para commitar.' }"
